mapper.select: SELECT * FROM group_link WHERE link_url = #{url} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO group_link (link_url, group_name, label_id, import_batch_id, origin, membership_state, remark, created_at, updated_at, created_by) VALUES (#{linkUrl}, #{groupName}, #{labelId}, #{importBatchId}, COALESCE(#{origin}, 1), COALESCE(#{membershipState}, 1), #{remark}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{createdBy})
mapper.update: UPDATE group_link SET deleted_at = NULL, label_id = #{labelId}, import_batch_id = #{batchId}, group_name = COALESCE(#{groupName}, group_name), updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE group_link SET label_id = #{labelId}, import_batch_id = #{batchId}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL AND label_id IS NULL
mapper.sql:
g.deleted_at IS NULL
AND g.label_id = #{labelId}
AND b.source_file_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{sourceFileName}, '%')
AND g.origin = #{origin}
AND g.membership_state = #{membershipState}
AND (h.id IS NULL OR h.health_status IS NULL) AND (h.is_banned IS NULL OR h.is_banned = 0)
AND h.health_status = 1 AND (h.is_banned IS NULL OR h.is_banned = 0)
AND h.is_banned = 1
AND h.health_status = 2 AND (h.is_banned IS NULL OR h.is_banned = 0)
AND h.health_status = 3 AND (h.is_banned IS NULL OR h.is_banned = 0)
AND ( g.group_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.wa_subject LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR g.link_url LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.owner_phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR a.admin LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR b.source_file_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )

FROM group_link g LEFT JOIN group_link_import_batch b ON g.import_batch_id = b.id LEFT JOIN group_link_preview p ON p.group_link_id = g.id LEFT JOIN group_link_health h ON h.group_link_id = g.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT group_jid, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT account ORDER BY account SEPARATOR ', ') AS admin FROM join_task_result WHERE is_admin = 1 AND group_jid IS NOT NULL AND group_jid != '' GROUP BY group_jid ) a ON a.group_jid = p.group_jid
mapper.select:
SELECT g.id, g.link_url AS url, COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(g.group_name), ''), p.wa_subject) AS groupName, p.wa_subject AS waSubject, p.group_jid AS groupJid, b.source_file_name AS sourceFileName, h.health_status AS healthStatus, h.is_banned AS banned, p.member_size AS memberSize, h.current_count AS currentCount, p.owner_phone AS ownerPhone, a.admin AS admin, g.origin AS origin, g.membership_state AS membershipState, g.remark AS remark, p.avatar_url AS avatarUrl, p.last_preview_at AS lastPreviewAt, h.last_check_at AS lastCheckAt, h.last_health_error AS lastHealthError, g.created_at AS createdAt
WHERE ORDER BY g.created_at DESC, g.id DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM group_link WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND id IN #{i}
